name: Hey Krishna
overview: Krishna, a 25-year-old engineering graduate, leads a boring life as every girl he tries to impress rejects him. A series of incidents makes him believe that lord Krishna is the root cause of his love life troubles and takes a drastic decision that alters his life forever.

trailers.title: Hey Krishna Web Series Trailer | Varun Sandesh | Kashish Vohra | Viva Harsha | YuppTV Originals
